title: alnus cordata var. rotundifolia
intro: Alnus cordata var. rotundifolia is a lesser-known variety of the Japanese white birch tree, also known as the Japanese alder, which is native to Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Alnus cordata var. rotundifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Alnus cordata var. rotundifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
